stories.headline: Teenagers cleared of murdering 15-year-old boy in sword attack
stories.description: Amen Teklay died after a confrontation involving the two boys, who were aged 14 and 15 at the time, ...

stories.headline: FIFA lifts US star’s suspension at World Cup after Trump call; Khamenei’s funeral procession
stories.description: Welcome back and hope you had a lovely holiday weekend.

stories.headline: Huge crowd joins funeral procession for Iran’s Supreme Leader Khamenei
stories.description: Enormous crowds gather in Tehran for third day to mourn amid calls for revenge against the US and Israel.

stories.headline: UK fighter jets intercept Russian plane over Norwegian Sea
stories.description: The Ministry of Defence calls Moscow's activity "unsafe" and "unprofessional".

stories.headline: Inquiry into care of Norfolk man arrested after crocodile attack
stories.description: Norfolk County Council confirms it has launched the inquiry following the attack near Huntingdon.
